gaps.description: M1: Remote profiles from CDN with local cache (src/detector/profiles.js)
M1: Ollama auto-install and model pull (src/detector/ollama.js, src/cli/setup.js)
M1: Basic HTTP REST API with SSE streaming (src/server/api.js)
M1: Web UI minimal chat dialog (src/ui/client/)
M1: One-click install script — bin/ and install/ exist but npx entrypoint completeness unverified
M2: STT integration — SenseVoice/Whisper/cloud fallback adapter (src/runtime/stt.js); depends on agentic-voice package not in node_modules
M2: TTS integration — Kokoro/Piper/cloud fallback adapter (src/runtime/tts.js); depends on agentic-voice package not in node_modules
M2: Push-to-talk UI (PushToTalk.vue) and VAD composable (useVAD.js)
M2: Wake word — WakeWord.vue + useWakeWord.js in UI; server-side pipeline is a stub with no real mic capture
M3: WebSocket device registration and heartbeat (src/server/hub.js)
M3: Visual perception — face/gesture/object via agentic-sense (src/runtime/sense.js); depends on agentic-sense package
M3: Device tools speak/display/capture via sendCommand (src/server/hub.js)
M3: Admin panel with device list, logs, hardware, config (src/ui/admin/)
M4: Cloud fallback auto-switch to OpenAI/Anthropic when Ollama fails (src/runtime/llm.js)
M4: Config hot-reload when remote profiles update — watchProfiles() wired in llm.js
M4: Docker deployment — docker-compose.yml in install/ (previously confirmed)
M4: Complete user documentation/README — README.md exists but completeness unverified
